trip.route: BOS → Istanbul → Dhaka → Singapore → Bali → BOS
trip.rules: 5 nights Bali · 2 nights Istanbul · 2 nights Singapore · Dhaka ≤29 days · home by Feb 7, 2027 · cheapest airline wins (THAI/SQ upgrade noted when available)
